title: Distribute URLs Evenly by Domain with Python
summary: Reorder crawl URLs so requests stay spread across domains instead of clustering on one site.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior covers empty input, single-domain passthrough, balanced alternation, anti-clustering for skewed domains, preference for domains with more remaining URLs, exact-string domain grouping, and invalid input types.
